# comfyui_workflow_history (Data Source)

Retrieves workflow execution history for a specific prompt from the ComfyUI server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "comfyui_workflow_history" "recent" {
  prompt_id = "abc-123-def"
}

output "workflow_status" {
  value = data.comfyui_workflow_history.recent.status
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `prompt_id` (String) The prompt ID to look up history for.

### Read-Only

- `completed` (Boolean) Whether the workflow execution has completed.
- `outputs` (String) JSON representation of all node outputs.
- `status` (String) Execution status (e.g., completed, error, running).
